betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6FEnSU§f

§aUnlimited energy storage — the ultimate buffer for DFC-scale power!§f

The §bFEnSU§f (§bFerriswheel Electronium Storage Unit§f) is the ultimate energy storage device in NTM. Unlike batteries and capacitors, the FEnSU can hold an §cunlimited§f amount of energy with extremely high input/output rates.

§6Production§f:
The FEnSU is forged in the §bPlasma Forge§f requiring:
Duration: §e300 seconds§f
Power: §e1 GHE/t§f
Plasma Input: §e1 GTU/t§f
Total: §e300 GHE§f

Recipe:
§bElectronium Ingot×64§f + Quantum Battery + Welded Osmiridium Plate×64 ×2
Cast Bismuth Bronze Plate×64 + Cast CMB Steel Plate×32 + Dense Magnetized Tungsten Wire×32 + Dineutronium Compound Plate×64
Pulverized Enchantment×64 + Metastable U238M2 Ingot + Crystalline Fullerite×64 ×2

§6Properties§f:
§b• §cInfinite§f energy storage capacity
§b• Extremely high input and output rates
§b• Essential for maintaining the DFC's massive power requirements

§cWarning§f: The FEnSU is the most expensive machine in NTM! Each one requires §e64§f electronium ingots, plus massive quantities of other endgame materials. Build it only when you have full endgame material production set up.

§eTip§f: The FEnSU is ESSENTIAL before building a DFC. The DFC's power output fluctuates and can spike to levels that would destroy conventional storage. The FEnSU's unlimited capacity and high throughput make it mandatory for stable DFC operation.
